name: /pr-source-remove refuses to remove a source that is the sole evidence for any active rule
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 2, applies_to: [node]}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'rule_id: r1
provenance:
  - {class: pr-corpus, source_id: my-src, sole_evidence: true}
' > pr-corpus/evidence/r1.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'sole_evidence' err.txt && grep -q 'rule=r1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
